summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are left closed; remaining open PRs are kept in review/backlog with specific blockers from the hydrated preflight artifact.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive route-only item; non-mutating quarantine is required and unrelated PRs can still be classified.
Security-sensitive route-only item; do not close, merge, comment, label, or fix through ProjectClownfish.
Already closed; no mutation is valid in this plan run.
Useful focused contributor PR with passing proof, but maintainer review/merge decision is required and merge is blocked for this job.
Related active fix candidate, but proof failure blocks stronger action.
The PR appears useful and proof is now green, but final readiness requires maintainer judgment; merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Active contributor PR with passing proof but unresolved review/technical-correctness judgment; no close or merge action is safe.
Potentially useful focused PR with green checks, but final technical correctness and merge readiness require maintainer review.
Active linked implementation PR, but unresolved review/author-follow-up blocks merge or closeout.
Broad feature PR with updated proof but maintainer product/API decision is still required; no low-signal or superseded closeout is supported.
